content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/app.py:1	from flask import Flask, render_request, redirect, url_for, request, render_template2	from database import db3	from models import URL4	import string5	import random6	7	app = Flask(__name__)8	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///urls.db'9	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False10	11	db.init_app(app)12	13	def generate_short_id(length=6):14	    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits15	    return ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))16	17	@app.before_first_request18	def create_tables():19	    db.create_all()20	21	@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])22	def index():23	    if request.method == 'POST':24	        original_url = request.form['url']25	        short_id = generate_short_id()26	        27	        new_url = URL(original_url=original_url, short_id=short_id)28	        db.session.add(new_url)29	        db.session.commit()30	        31	        return render_template('index.html', short_url=request.host_url + short_id)32	    33	    return render_template('index.html')34	35	@app.route('/<short_id>')36	def redirection(short_id):37	    url_entry = URL.query.filter_by(short_id=short_id).first_or_404()38	    return redirect(url_entry.original_url)39	40	if __name__ == '__main__':41	    app.run(debug=True)

content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/models.py:1	import string2	import random3	from database import get_db_connection4	5	def generate_short_url(length=6):6	    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits7	    return ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))8	9	class URLModel:10	    @staticmethod11	    def create_url(original_url):12	        conn = get_db_connection()13	        short_url = generate_short_url()14	        15	        # Ensure uniqueness16	        while conn.execute('SELECT id FROM urls WHERE short_url = ?', (short_url,)).fetchone():17	            short_url = generate_short_url()18	            19	        conn.execute('INSERT INTO urls (original_url, short_url) VALUES (?, ?)',20	                     (original_url, short_url))21	        conn.commit()22	        conn.close()23	        return short_url24	25	    @staticmethod26	    def get_original_url(short_url):27	        conn = get_db_connection()28	        url = conn.execute('SELECT original_url FROM urls WHERE short_url = ?',29	                           (short_url,)).fetchone()30	        conn.close()31	        if url:32	            return url['original_url']33	        return None34	35	    @staticmethod36	    def get_all_urls():37	        conn = get_db_connection()38	        urls = conn.execute('SELECT * FROM urls').fetchall()39	        conn.close()40	        return urls
